title: Gates & Loot Demo
blurb: Multi-scene exploration with a flag gate, an answer (password) gate, take_item loot, and quest flags.

antechamber.scene: A dusty antechamber. A dead scout lies against the wall, a water-stained journal in his lap; its last legible line reads: 'The iron door yields to no key, only to a spoken word: ashfall.' A bronze lever juts from a slot beside a humming, rune-warded arch — the arch's barrier still crackles, blocking the way on. A healing draught and a small bronze key glint in the rubble.

the warded arch.denied: The arch's barrier crackles and holds — the ward is still raised. Something here must lower it first.

gallery.scene: A long gallery of cracked statues. At the far end stands a heavy iron door, banded and glyph-marked, with no keyhole at all. A lustrous Pearl of Power rests on a fallen plinth nearby.

the iron door, banded and glyph-marked.denied: The iron door does not so much as shiver. Whatever opens it, it is not force — and you have not spoken the word.

vault.scene: Beyond the iron door, a vaulted treasury opens in hushed dark. On a velvet bier rests the Sundering Crown, the relic this barrow was raised to keep. There is nowhere further to go.
